title: Dual-candidate staged Phase 3 idempotency on one DB (mock)
problem: Tickets 151 and 160 prove idempotency for rank #1 and rank #2 spines separately. Operators lack proof that processing both OpenAlex candidates on the same DB through full spines does not duplicate rows when commands re-run.
acceptance_criteria: Unit test runs rank #1 then rank #2 full mock spines on one DB and re-runs both without duplicate row growth.
Per-command idempotency spot-check on shared DB after dual spine completion.
No live LLM or live network in default pytest collection.
Golden tests remain mock-only and pass.
rollback_plan: Remove dual-candidate idempotency test; retain ticket-160 rank #2 idempotency.
